project_detail.report_confirmation: Thank you. Your report has been submitted for review by our moderation team.
project_detail.closed_banner: This project is no longer accepting contributions.
project_detail.on_chain_notice: Contributions are secured by a Soroban smart contract on the Stellar network. Funds are held in an on-chain vault until milestones are approved.

contribution_modal.title: Contribute to Project
contribution_modal.disclaimer: This is an on-chain transaction on the Stellar network. Contributions are non-refundable unless the project is cancelled.
contribution_modal.amount_hint: Enter an amount using up to {{decimals}} decimal places. Minimum {{min}} XLM.

grants.title: Grants Rounds
grants.description: Quadratic funding — breadth of support determines matching
grants.qf_explanation: Quadratic funding rewards projects with broad community support. A project with 100 contributors of $1 each receives more matching than one with a single $100 donor.
grants.round_hint: Double tap to view round details

news.showing_cached: Showing cached news - Pull to refresh

notifications.notification_text: Price alerts and account activity will show up here.

manage_accounts.title: Manage Accounts
manage_accounts.description: Add linked Stellar public keys with QR and remove them when needed.
manage_accounts.scan_hint: The scanner accepts a raw Stellar public key or a QR payload that contains one.
manage_accounts.scan_to_attach: Scan a Stellar account QR code above to attach it to this profile.
manage_accounts.camera_permission_message: Allow camera access to scan a Stellar public key QR code.
manage_accounts.unsupported_qr_message: Scan a Stellar public key QR code or a QR payload that contains one.
manage_accounts.label: Label
manage_accounts.scanner_hint: Point the camera at a Stellar public key QR code.

notification_settings.title: Notification Settings
notification_settings.description: Toggle the specific alerts you want. Each change is pushed to the backend immediately.
notification_settings.price_alerts_desc: Immediate notifications when tracked market prices change meaningfully.
notification_settings.news_alerts_desc: Breaking ecosystem and market headlines relevant to your portfolio.
notification_settings.security_alerts_desc: Critical account, phishing, and suspicious-activity notices.
notification_settings.grant_alerts_desc: Notifications about new grant rounds, round starts, and deadline reminders.
notification_settings.contribution_alerts_desc: Updates on your contributions, matching status, and contribution confirmations.

biometric_lock.description: Require Face ID, fingerprint, or passcode on every cold app start.
biometric_lock.not_supported_message: This device does not support biometric authentication.
biometric_lock.no_biometrics_message: Set up Face ID or fingerprint in your device settings before enabling this lock.
biometric_lock.update_failed_message: Could not update biometric lock preference. Please try again.

network.mainnet_unavailable_message: Configure mainnet API and Soroban RPC endpoints before switching.
